Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Let's now use the Formation Editor to move the frigate Narvik out to a picket station far away from the main body of the formation.

Open the Formation Editor as instructed before, and then click and drag on the red dot representing Narvik to move it out to 10 nautical miles from the formation center in any direction you choose. The numerals on the outside of the Formation Editor rings are the range from the Formation Leader in nautical miles. Note that you can use the bottom slider to increase the range shown in formation editor.
Once you move the ship's station, it will immediately receive a new auto-waypoint to go to that station. Use time compression to watch this process unfold.
